## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview with Marta for the Managing Editor position at fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is impressed with Marta's video responses and background in linguistics](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [fwd.digital is growing rapidly, with 20 new clients in the pipeline and $2M annual revenue in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [The company focuses on AI-native services, combining expert strategy with AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Marta's expertise in linguistics and language is seen as highly valuable for AI interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Both parties express mutual interest, with Marcel indicating intent to move towards an offer](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Vision

  - [fwd.digital aims to build a different type of company, leveraging AI to change knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus on AI-native services: software margin services with higher quality than white-glove service](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Started with content but expanding beyond, viewing linguistics as crucial for AI interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Growth from 0 to $2M annual revenue in less than 5 months, with 20 new clients in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Current team of 12-15 people, including 6-7 account managers and key strategists](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Business Model and Client Engagement

  - [Initial model: $9,000/month for up to 3 months, no long-term commitment](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Shifting to 12-month contracts, aiming for higher monthly rates ($18,000-$27,000)](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Weekly 30-minute client touchpoints and ongoing Slack communication](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Flexible approach: manual processes first, then building workflows and automating](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Continuous improvement and self-disruption to stay ahead of competition](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Marta's Experience and Insights

  - [Attended industry conferences, noting disappointment in focus on features rather than systemic changes](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of rethinking entire processes with AI, not just adding features](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Highlighted need for human expertise in areas machines can't replicate, especially in linguistics](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Stressed importance of quality assessment and risk management in AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Role Expectations and Company Culture

  - [Seeking excellence and an internal drive for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Emphasis on understanding clients' businesses deeply and building trust](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Looking for proactive problem-solving and process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Valuing a supportive team environment with open communication](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Compensation and Start Date

  - [Marta's salary expectation: around $12,000 (currency not specified)](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [Flexibility on working hours, understanding potential for non-standard hours](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Earliest potential start date: two weeks from the interview](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to follow up with more details and move towards making an offer](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - Marta to send along references if not already provided
  - [Both parties to align on final details and confirm start date](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Marcel to conduct reference checks in parallel with offer preparation](https://fathom.video/share/fUszGYtcw4eCnNwVD5EdMKCMTMv7GyJd?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
